name: Summit Pale Ale Recipe Pack
description: A complete homebrewing recipe pack for Summit Pale Ale, a 5-gallon American Pale Ale. Includes recipe, structured ingredient data, a prompt template for recipe adjustment, and evaluation questions.
not_intended_for: commercial resale of recipe as standalone product

content.title: Summit Pale Ale Recipe
content.description: Complete recipe with grain bill, hop schedule, yeast, mash parameters, and fermentation instructions.

content.title: Structured Ingredient Data
content.description: Machine-readable ingredient list with amounts, alpha acids, and notes for each grain, hop, and yeast addition.

content.title: Recipe Adjustment Prompt Template
content.description: A prompt template for using an LLM to answer recipe adjustment questions. Fill in recipe data and user question before use.

content.title: Basic Recipe Evaluation Questions
content.description: Eight evaluation questions (beginner and intermediate) testing knowledge of the Summit Pale Ale recipe.
